task_completion.description: Verify a non-root USER is specified in the Dockerfile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Dockerfile open in a text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat, git diff) with a 'USER' directive specifying a non-root user (e.g., 'USER appuser' or 'USER 1000').

task_completion.description: Verify hardcoded secrets are removed from docker-compose.yml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing docker-compose.yml where environment variables for passwords or secrets are either removed entirely or replaced with secure variable references (e.g., '${DB_PASSWORD}').

task_completion.description: Verify resource limits are added to the Kubernetes deployment.yaml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of deployment.yaml showing a 'resources:' block with 'limits:' (e.g., cpu, memory) defined for the container specifications.

task_completion.description: Verify health probes are added to the Kubernetes deployment.yaml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of deployment.yaml showing 'livenessProbe:' and/or 'readinessProbe:' blocks defined within the container specifications.

task_completion.description: Verify ingress rules in Terraform main.tf are restricted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of main.tf showing security group ingress rules where 'cidr_blocks' are restricted to specific IPs or internal networks, and no longer open to the world ('0.0.0.0/0') for sensitive ports.

task_completion.description: Verify at least two security headers are added to nginx.conf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of nginx.conf showing at least two 'add_header' directives for security purposes (e.g., X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Strict-Transport-Security).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually modified the files in the target directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands like 'git diff', file saves in an IDE (like VS Code), or 'cat' outputs showing the modified files in '/home/ga/workspace/platform_infra/', rather than just printing the answers to the console.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake a verification script or echo success messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show actual file edits in an editor (nano, vim, VS Code) or standard file manipulation commands, not a script echoing 'All checks passed' or 'Remediation complete'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used standard text editors or shell commands to modify the infrastructure code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard UI elements of text editors or valid sed/awk/echo commands in the terminal modifying the configuration files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The pass threshold is 60/100 points. The agent must remediate six specific security issues in the infrastructure codebase: 1) Add a non-root Docker USER in Dockerfile. 2) Remove hardcoded secrets in docker-compose.yml. 3) Add resource limits in Kubernetes deployment.yaml. 4) Add health probes in Kubernetes deployment.yaml. 5) Restrict ingress rules (remove 0.0.0.0/0 on sensitive ports) in Terraform main.tf. 6) Add at least two security headers in nginx.conf.
